action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres, TRIM(a."Utilities") AS utilities, TRIM(a."Exemptions") AS exemptions
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') AS a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE ps.acres < 2

cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH sedro_woolley_parcels AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres, ps.land_use, ps.owner_name
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
    AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113)
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) > 0
), low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
)
SELECT swp.parcel_number, swp.acres, swp.land_use, swp.owner_name, 'MSL low quality improvement' AS match_reasons
FROM sedro_woolley_parcels swp
JOIN low_quality_improvements lqi ON swp.parcel_number = lqi.parcel_number
ORDER BY swp.parcel_number
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Low Quality Residential Dwellings on 1-3 Acre Parcels
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality (improvement class MSL) and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres, a."Utilities" AS utilities, ps.improvement_building_count
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE ps.acres > 1
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND (
    lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%'
    OR lower(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%'
  )
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount with acreage greater than 1, having utilities, and no buildings or improvements present.

cases.prompt: Recreation lots in sedro-woolley
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.improvement_building_count
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 710 AND 790
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
  AND COALESCE(ps.acres, 0) > 0
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%MH LEASED%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%CONDOMINIUM%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%PUBLIC%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%CIVIC%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%OPEN SPACE%'
ORDER BY ps.acres DESC
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city area with land use codes indicating recreational or cultural/recreation use, excluding parcels with buildings or improvements, and excluding mobile home leased, condominium, public/civic, or zero-acre parcels.

cases.prompt: Low quality single family residential parcels countywide with condition evidence included.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH sfr_parcels AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    ps.improvement_building_count,
    pis.condition_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  LEFT JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_improvement_summary.parquet') AS pis
    ON ps.parcel_number = pis.parcel_number
  WHERE
    ps.improvement_building_count > 0
    AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113)
), low_quality_parcels AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number,
    string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') AS i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
  GROUP BY TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
)
SELECT
  sfr.parcel_number,
  sfr.land_use,
  sfr.improvement_building_count,
  sfr.condition_codes,
  lq.quality_codes,
  'Low quality SFR with MSL class improvements' AS match_reasons
FROM sfr_parcels AS sfr
JOIN low_quality_parcels AS lq
  ON sfr.parcel_number = lq.parcel_number
cases.title: Low Quality Single Family Residential Parcels Countywide with Condition Evidence
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels classified as single family residential (land use codes 110, 111, 112, 113) with at least one improvement building, and join improvements to identify parcels with low quality class codes (MSL). Include condition codes as evidence.

cases.prompt: MSA average-quality single family homes in Skagit County, excluding low quality homes.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH sfr_parcels AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    ps.acres,
    ps.assessed_value
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113)
),
imprv_quality AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number,
    string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) IN ('MSA', 'MSF', 'MSG', 'MSVG', 'MSE', 'MSL')
  GROUP BY parcel_number
),
filtered_parcels AS (
  SELECT
    s.parcel_number,
    s.land_use,
    s.acres,
    s.assessed_value,
    q.quality_codes
  FROM sfr_parcels s
  JOIN imprv_quality q ON s.parcel_number = q.parcel_number
  WHERE q.quality_codes LIKE '%MSA%'
    AND q.quality_codes NOT LIKE '%MSL%'
)
SELECT
  parcel_number,
  land_use,
  acres,
  assessed_value,
  quality_codes
FROM filtered_parcels
cases.title: MSA Average-Quality Single Family Homes in Skagit County
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels with single family residential land use codes (110, 111, 112, 113) having at least one improvement with MSA (average) quality class, excluding low quality (MSL) improvements. Countywide Skagit search with no city or floodplain restrictions.
